vocab.example: I opened a pull request for the search feature. Can you review it?
vocab.example_vi: Tôi đã tạo pull request cho tính năng tìm kiếm. Bạn review giúp tôi được không?

vocab.example: Minh approved my pull request this morning.
vocab.example_vi: Minh đã phê duyệt pull request của tôi sáng nay.

vocab.example: Please merge this branch after the tests pass.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy gộp nhánh này sau khi test pass nhé.

vocab.meaning_vi: bình luận / góp ý trong code
vocab.example: I left a comment about the naming of this function.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi để lại một góp ý về cách đặt tên hàm này.

vocab.example: We should refactor this file — it's too long.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng ta nên tái cấu trúc file này — nó quá dài.

vocab.example: Your code is readable, but please add more comments.
vocab.example_vi: Code của bạn dễ đọc, nhưng hãy thêm nhiều comment hơn.

vocab.example: There is a conflict between your branch and main.
vocab.example_vi: Có xung đột giữa nhánh của bạn và nhánh main.

vocab.example: Can you add me as a reviewer on this pull request?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn thêm tôi làm reviewer cho pull request này được không?

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Hi Hoa, I opened a pull request for the search feature. Can you be the reviewer?

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Sure, send me the link. I will check it after lunch.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Thanks. It's not too big, around two hundred lines.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Okay, I finished reading it. I left a few comments.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: The logic is good, but the code is not very readable. Can you rename some variables?

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Sure, I can refactor that part today.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Also, there is a conflict with the main branch. Please fix it before you merge.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Got it. I will fix the conflict and update the pull request.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Great. I will approve it once everything looks good.

questions.q: What did Minh ask Hoa to do?
options: Be the reviewer for his pull request

questions.q: What did Hoa say about the code?
options: The logic is good but it's not very readable

questions.q: What will Minh do before merging?
options: Fix the conflict and update the pull request

shadowing: I opened a pull request for the search feature.
Can you be the reviewer on this pull request?
The logic is good, but the code is not very readable.
There is a conflict with the main branch.
I will approve it once everything looks good.

interview.question: How do you make sure your code quality is good before submitting a pull request?
tips_vi: Liệt kê quy trình cụ thể: tự test, đọc lại diff, chạy linter
Nhắc đến việc viết mô tả PR rõ ràng cho reviewer
Có thể nêu ví dụ một lần review giúp bạn tránh bug
interview.sample_answer: Before I submit a pull request, I always test my code locally and run the linter to check the style. I also read through my own diff one more time, like I am the reviewer. This helps me catch small mistakes, like unused variables or missing comments. I try to write a clear pull request description, so my teammate understands what changed and why. If the change is big, I split it into smaller pull requests. This makes it easier and faster for others to review.

interview.question: Tell me about a time you disagreed with a code review comment.
tips_vi: Dùng cấu trúc STAR ngắn gọn: tình huống, hành động, kết quả
Thể hiện thái độ tôn trọng, không đổ lỗi cho reviewer
Kết thúc bằng bài học rút ra
interview.sample_answer: Once a reviewer asked me to change my function to use a different design pattern. At first, I disagreed because I thought my way was simpler. I explained my reason in the comment and asked why he preferred his approach. He showed me that his way would be easier to test in the future. After discussing, I agreed and updated my code. I learned that it is important to listen first, and code review is a good chance to learn from teammates.
